title: Wire tick-activity driver: update .gitattributes, EnsureGitAttributes, ConfigureMergeDriver
description:
After the merge-activity driver lands, wire it into all the configuration points.

Files to modify:
- .gitattributes: change '.tick/activity/activity.jsonl merge=union' to '.tick/activity/activity.jsonl merge=tick-activity'
- internal/github/git.go — EnsureGitAttributes:
  - Add second attribute constant: '.tick/activity/activity.jsonl merge=tick-activity'
  - Ensure BOTH the tick and tick-activity lines are present (idempotent)
- internal/github/git.go — ConfigureMergeDriver (or rename to ConfigureAllMergeDrivers):
  - Also register merge.tick-activity.name and merge.tick-activity.driver ('tk merge-activity %O %A %B %P')
  - Keep the existing tick driver registration

Tests in internal/github/:
- EnsureGitAttributes: verify it writes both attribute lines when .gitattributes is empty
- EnsureGitAttributes: verify it is idempotent when both lines already present
- ConfigureMergeDriver: verify both tick and tick-activity drivers are configured

Run: go test ./internal/github/...
acceptance_criteria: .gitattributes uses merge=tick-activity; EnsureGitAttributes writes both lines; both drivers configured; go test ./internal/github/... passes
